articles.description: Portland Trail Blazers (38-38, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Los Angeles Clippers (39-36, eighth in the Western Conference)
articles.headline: Clippers face the Trail Blazers on 5-game win streak

articles.description: Charlotte Hornets (39-36, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Brooklyn Nets (18-57, 13th in the Eastern Conference)
articles.headline: Charlotte takes on Brooklyn for conference showdown

articles.description: Philadelphia 76ers (41-33, seventh in the Eastern Conference) vs. Miami Heat (39-36, ninth in the Eastern Conference)
articles.headline: Miami plays Philadelphia on home slide

articles.description: Detroit Pistons (54-20, first in the Eastern Conference) vs. Oklahoma City Thunder (59-16, first in the Western Conference)
articles.headline: Oklahoma City looks for 60th win this season in matchup with Detroit

articles.description: Boston Celtics (50-24, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Atlanta Hawks (42-33, sixth in the Eastern Conference)
articles.headline: Celtics play the Hawks, look for 4th straight win

articles.description: New York Knicks (48-27, third in the Eastern Conference) vs. Houston Rockets (45-29, sixth in the Western Conference)
articles.headline: Houston plays New York in non-conference matchup

videos.description: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Minnesota Timberwolves: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Los Angeles Lakers vs. Minnesota Timberwolves: Game Highlights) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Minnesota Timberwolves: Game Highlights

videos.description: Austin Reaves dishes to Jake LaRavia, who knocks down a trey for the Lakers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jake LaRavia cashes in on a 3 for the Lakers) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jake LaRavia cashes in on a 3 for the Lakers

videos.description: Julius Randle pulls up from the wing and drains a 3-pointer for the Timberwolves.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Julius Randle drops in a 3 from the wing) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Julius Randle drops in a 3 from the wing

videos.description: Julius Randle drives toward the rack and drops in a floater for Minnesota.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Julius Randle rattles in a floater) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Julius Randle rattles in a floater

videos.description: Jaden McDaniels gets to the basket and muscles in an and-1 for the Timberwolves.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jaden McDaniels gets and-1 to fall for Minnesota) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaden McDaniels gets and-1 to fall for Minnesota

videos.description: Dalton Knecht drives along the baseline for a two-handed dunk for the Lakers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Knecht glides in for a Lakers jam) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Knecht glides in for a Lakers jam

videos.description: Rob Dillingham tries to drop in a layup, but Dalton Knecht is right there for the block for the Lakers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Knecht elevates for a block for the Lakers) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Knecht elevates for a block for the Lakers

videos.description: Julius Randle gets another 3-pointer to fall to keep the Timberwolves rolling in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Randle keeps the Wolves going with a 3-pointer) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Randle keeps the Wolves going with a 3-pointer

videos.description: Jaxson Hayes rises up for an emphatic block for the Lakers in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jaxson Hayes makes this block look easy) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaxson Hayes makes this block look easy

videos.description: Rudy Gobert elevates for a massive dunk over Jaxson Hayes for the Timberwolves.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Gobert posterizes Hayes with emphatic slam) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gobert posterizes Hayes with emphatic slam

videos.description: Dalton Knecht banks in a tough shot while drawing contact for the Lakers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Knecht banks in and-1 for the Lakers) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Knecht banks in and-1 for the Lakers

videos.description: Austin Reaves shows off his range as he knocks down a 3-pointer for the Lakers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Austin Reaves cashes in on a 3) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Austin Reaves cashes in on a 3

videos.description: Julius Randle knocks down a tough baseline jumper while drawing a foul.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Randle muscles in and-1 for Minnesota) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Randle muscles in and-1 for Minnesota

videos.description: Julius Randle knocks down a smooth fadeaway jumper over Deandre Ayton for the Timberwolves.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Randle sinks a fadeaway jumper for the Wolves) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Randle sinks a fadeaway jumper for the Wolves

videos.description: Austin Reaves sinks a floater while drawing a foul for the Lakers in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Reaves flies in for a Lakers and-1) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Reaves flies in for a Lakers and-1

videos.description: Austin Reaves passes ahead to Jake LaRavia, who drops in an off-balanced shot while drawing contact.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Reaves feeds LaRavia for a Lakers and-1) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Reaves feeds LaRavia for a Lakers and-1

videos.description: Julius Randle uses glass to knock down a tough jumper while drawing contact.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Julius Randle gets and-1 to bank in for Minnesota) 2025/10/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Julius Randle gets and-1 to bank in for Minnesota

videos.description: Rob Dillingham blows by Deandre Ayton for a Timberwolves layup.
